expectations.text: Explains why a fix that passes 780px can fail at 812px and requires tests on both sides of breakpoints.
expectations.evidence: Identifies the 781–850px risk interval where desktop labels reappear and tests 780/781/812/844/850/851.

expectations.text: Moves or protects restart with confirmation instead of only restyling it.
expectations.evidence: Moves restart into settings and specifies cancel-first confirmation, Escape cancel, and one-shot initialization.

expectations.text: Requires touch targets around 44x44 CSS pixels and preserves HP, currency, and run progress.
expectations.evidence: Requires 44×44 controls and explicitly says HP、金币和路线进度 cannot all be hidden.

expectations.text: Provides at least five concrete viewport or boundary checks, including low-height landscape.
Separates observable symptom, root cause, fix, and regression pass condition.
expectations.evidence: Response has dedicated diagnosis, root-cause comparison, minimal fix and two acceptance sections.

suggestions.reason: This prompt gives away the breakpoint and restart risks, so a strong baseline also passes most checks; treat it as a weakly discriminating eval.

eval_feedback.overall: Useful for regression coverage but weak for measuring skill lift.
